project_version.description: Aurora Translator project version that produced this AEDB payload.
project_version.title: Project Version

parser_version.description: AEDB parser version that produced this AEDB payload.
parser_version.title: Parser Version

output_schema_version.description: AEDB JSON schema version for this payload.
output_schema_version.title: Output Schema Version

read_only.description: Whether the layout was opened in read-only mode.
read_only.title: Read Only

is_segment.description: Whether the arc is actually a straight segment.
is_segment.title: Is Segment

is_point.description: Whether the arc degenerates to a point.
is_point.title: Is Point

is_ccw.description: Whether the arc direction is counter-clockwise.
is_ccw.title: Is Ccw

bounding_box.description: Component bounding box as [xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax].
bounding_box.title: Bounding Box

is_top_mounted.description: Whether the component is top mounted.
is_top_mounted.title: Is Top Mounted

DisplayValue.description: Numeric values that also preserve the original display string from PyEDB.

value.description: Numeric value in base units when PyEDB exposes one.
value.title: Value

display.description: Original string representation returned by PyEDB.
display.title: Display

DisplayValue.title: DisplayValue

valid.description: Whether end cap data is valid.
valid.title: Valid

is_stackup_layer.description: Whether it belongs to the stackup.
is_stackup_layer.title: Is Stackup Layer

is_via_layer.description: Whether it is marked as a via layer.
is_via_layer.title: Is Via Layer

primitive_type_counts.description: Primitive counts grouped by primitive type name.
primitive_type_counts.title: Primitive Type Counts

type.description: Material type or PyEDB type string.
type.title: Type

dielectric_model_frequency.description: Frequency used for dielectric model extraction when available.
dielectric_model_frequency.title: Dielectric Model Frequency

is_power_ground.description: Whether the net is power or ground.
is_power_ground.title: Is Power Ground

parameters.description: Geometry parameters keyed by parameter name.
parameters.title: Parameters

raw_points.description: Polygonal pad vertices when AEDB stores the pad with polygon geometry.
raw_points.title: Raw Points

hole_properties.description: Hole properties list returned by PyEDB.
hole_properties.title: Hole Properties

pad_by_layer.description: Regular pad properties keyed by layer name.
pad_by_layer.title: Pad By Layer

antipad_by_layer.description: Anti-pad properties keyed by layer name.
antipad_by_layer.title: Antipad By Layer

thermalpad_by_layer.description: Thermal pad properties keyed by layer name.
thermalpad_by_layer.title: Thermalpad By Layer

layer_range_names.description: Layer range labels returned by PyEDB.
layer_range_names.title: Layer Range Names

is_pin.description: Whether PyEDB marks this object as a pin.
is_pin.title: Is Pin

bbox.description: Bounding box as [xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax].
bbox.title: Bbox

is_void.description: Whether the primitive is a void.
is_void.title: Is Void

is_pin.description: Whether PyEDB marks this object as a pin.
is_pin.title: Is Pin

bbox.description: Bounding box as [xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax].
bbox.title: Bbox

is_void.description: Whether the primitive is a void.
is_void.title: Is Void

is_zone_primitive.description: Whether the polygon is a zone primitive.
is_zone_primitive.title: Is Zone Primitive

bbox.description: Void bounding box as [xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax].
bbox.title: Bbox

zone_primitives.description: Zone primitives represented with polygon fields.
zone_primitives.title: Zone Primitives

layout_size.description: Overall layout size as [width, height] in meters when available.
layout_size.title: Layout Size

stackup_thickness.description: Total stackup thickness in meters when available.
stackup_thickness.title: Stackup Thickness

num_layers.description: Layer count reported by PyEDB statistics.
num_layers.title: Num Layers

num_nets.description: Net count reported by PyEDB statistics.
num_nets.title: Num Nets

num_traces.description: Trace count reported by PyEDB statistics.
num_traces.title: Num Traces

num_polygons.description: Polygon count reported by PyEDB statistics.
num_polygons.title: Num Polygons

num_vias.description: Via count reported by PyEDB statistics.
num_vias.title: Num Vias

num_discrete_components.description: Discrete component count reported by PyEDB statistics.
num_discrete_components.title: Num Discrete Components

num_inductors.description: Inductor count reported by PyEDB statistics.
num_inductors.title: Num Inductors

num_resistors.description: Resistor count reported by PyEDB statistics.
num_resistors.title: Num Resistors

num_capacitors.description: Capacitor count reported by PyEDB statistics.
num_capacitors.title: Num Capacitors

metadata.description: High-level metadata about the parsed layout.

materials.description: Material definitions. Omitted in summary-only mode.
materials.title: Materials

layers.description: Ordered stackup layers. Omitted in summary-only mode.
layers.title: Layers

nets.description: Resolved nets. Omitted in summary-only mode.
nets.title: Nets

components.description: Resolved components and pins. Omitted in summary-only mode.
components.title: Components

padstacks.description: Padstack definitions and instances. Omitted in summary-only mode.

primitives.description: Serialized layout primitives. Omitted in summary-only mode.
